narrative:
Precinct Vermilion City 4-A (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,433 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.5 percentage points.
